Project: menschlichkeit-oesterreich
Summary: Monorepo for NGO civic-tech platform with FastAPI APIs, Drupal/CiviCRM, n8n automation, and containerized operations.

Primary services:
- apps/api (FastAPI)
- api.menschlichkeit-oesterreich.at (FastAPI + CiviCRM integration)
- apps/crm (Drupal 10 + CiviCRM runtime)
- automation/n8n (workflow automation)
- apps/website (web frontend)

AI artifacts (generated):
- docs/ai/repo-manifest.json
- docs/ai/service-map.json
- docs/ai/dependency-graph.json
- docs/ai/data-flows.json
- docs/ai/entrypoints.json
- docs/ai/schemas/*.schema.json

OpenAPI endpoints (service-defined):
- apps/api: /api/openapi.json
- api.menschlichkeit-oesterreich.at: /openapi.json (runtime default)

Generation sources:
- scripts/ai/generate_*.py
- docker-compose*.yml
- .github/workflows/*.yml
- package.json and service manifests

Validation:
- scripts/ai/validate_ai_artifacts.py

Note:
- Unsicherheiten sind pro Objekt als assumptions markiert.
